Official data.gouv.fr Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that allows AI chatbots to search, explore, and analyze datasets from the French national Open Data platform, directly through conversation.

A slightly opinionated Nix flake for ComfyUI with curated custom nodes. Supports macOS (Apple Silicon) and Linux with CUDA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] Anionex/banana-slides
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides
Language: typescript
一个基于nano banana pro🍌的原生AI PPT生成应用，迈向真正的＂Vibe PPT＂; 支持上传任意模板图片；上传任意素材&智能解析；一句话/大纲/页面描述自动生成PPT；口头修改指定区域、一键导出可编辑ppt - An AI-native PPT generator based on nano banana pro🍌

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] dontriskit/awesome-ai-system-prompts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dontriskit/awesome-ai-system-prompts
Language: typescript
🧠 Curated collection of system prompts for top AI tools. Perfect for AI agent builders and prompt engineers. Incuding: ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Manus, Claude-Code, Loveable, v0, Grok, same new, windsurf, notion, and MetaAI.
